decisions.decision: #60 playlist bug: cache-first diagnosis before code investigation
decisions.rationale: User went through v2.1.2→Gemini patches→v2.1.3→v2.1.6, stale cache most likely cause. Own playlists work fine on our setup.
Only user with Custom Client ID search failure. Script tests client_credentials→search directly against Spotify API to isolate app config vs SpotOn routing.

next_action: Warten auf Rückmeldungen: #86 (urknall Diagnose-Script Output), #60 (warminskimarcin Cache-Clear Ergebnis), #74 (alex-aust Followup). Backlog: #7 Search Pagination, #55 Context Menu LMS Items, #6 Spotty Migration, #32 Library Integration.
context_notes: v2.1.7 current. Reine Triage-Session, kein Code geändert. Alle aktiven Issues beantwortet, warten auf User-Feedback. Upstream PRs (librespot #1724, SqueezeDSP #19) brauchen keine Aktion — IPv6 ist gevendort, SqueezeDSP wartet auf Foxenfurter.
